code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> PENDING: Order Placed

    PENDING --> PAID: Payment Authorized & Escrowed
    PENDING --> CANCELLED: Payment Failed

    PAID --> SHIPPED: Seller Ships Order
    PAID --> CANCELLED: Seller Cancels

    SHIPPED --> DELIVERED: Carrier Reports Delivery
    SHIPPED --> CANCELLED: Delivery Failed

    DELIVERED --> COMPLETED: Delivery Confirmed (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
    DELIVERED --> DISPUTED: Customer Raises Dispute

    DISPUTED --> COMPLETED: Dispute Resolved - Favor Seller
    DISPUTED --> CANCELLED: Dispute Resolved - Favor Customer (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)

    COMPLETED --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]: Funds Released to Seller
    CANCELLED --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]: Funds Refunded to Customer

    note right of PENDING
        Data: order_id, total_amount
        Escrow: Not yet created
    end note

    note right of PAID
        Data: payment_id, escrow_id
        Escrow: Funds held
        Trigger: Seller notification sent
    end note

    note right of SHIPPED
        Data: tracking_number, carrier
        Escrow: Still held
        Trigger: Customer notification sent
    end note

    note right of DELIVERED
        Data: delivered_at timestamp
        Escrow: Still held
        Auto-confirm: Timer starts
    end note

    note right of COMPLETED
        Data: confirmed_at timestamp
        Escrow: Released to seller
        Final state
    end note

    note right of DISPUTED
        Data: dispute_reason, dispute_date
        Escrow: Frozen until resolution
        Manual: Admin intervention
    end note

    note right of CANCELLED
        Data: cancelled_at, cancel_reason
        Escrow: Refunded to customer
        Final state
    end note
repo_description: System design skill for Claude Code using EventStorming and Mermaid diagrams

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网场景设计一个订单状态流转图。核心是用边缘节点做自动确认，用执行器控制器处理退款。起点是边缘节点收到订单，进入待支付状态。
明白了，边缘节点触发订单创建。那支付环节呢？是直接进入已支付，还是有失败分支？
支付要有两条出路：授权成功进资金托管，失败则取消。已支付后卖家发货，但卖家也能主动取消。发货后由承运商上报配送状态。
好的，我先把主干画出来：待支付到已支付是资金托管，到取消是支付失败。已支付可以发货或取消。发货后配送成功到已送达，配送失败也能取消。
已送达是关键节点。边缘节点自动确认后完成订单，释放资金给卖家。但客户也能发起争议，进入人工仲裁。
确认一下：自动确认是边缘节点的能力，争议解决后如果客户胜诉，也是边缘节点触发退款？
不对，客户胜诉的退款应该由执行器控制器处理，不是边缘节点。边缘节点只做确认，执行器控制器管资金退回。完成订单的资金释放也是回到边缘节点。
修正了：争议判客户胜诉时，执行器控制器触发退款到取消态。完成态的资金释放回边缘节点。另外我给每个状态加上注释，标注托管资金状态和触发条件。
可以，特别注意已送达的注释要标明自动确认计时器启动，争议状态要注明资金冻结和人工介入。这两个是业务关键。
都加上了。最终状态是已完成和已取消，都有资金去向的标注。整个流程覆盖了支付、履约、争议、结算四个阶段，边缘节点和执行器控制器的职责也分清楚了。
